description_long: This is a wooden slat bench with a simple, modern design, featuring three horizontal backrest slats and a flat, wide seat composed of several parallel wooden planks. The bench is supported by four sturdy legs, with the two rear legs extending upward to form the frame for the backrest. Both ends of the bench are equipped with armrests, providing comfort and support for users. The legs and supporting frame appear to be made of metal, painted black for contrast and durability. The overall construction suggests it is designed for public use, such as in parks or along sidewalks, with materials chosen for weather resistance and longevity. The bench's clean lines and neutral color palette make it suitable for a variety of urban outdoor settings.
description: A modern wooden slat bench with black metal supports, armrests, and a horizontal slatted backrest, designed for outdoor public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, the three horizontal backrest slats, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the wooden slats, and the profile of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bench with the black metal frame and the horizontal wooden slats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the seat depth, armrest, and backrest profile from the other side.
attribute_leg_design: four straight metal legs with rectangular cross-section
